title: Purple Cupcakes Cupcake Bouquet Box - Vanilla Cream Boxes - Including an invisiTray - and Also a Matching Cream/Ivory Quick Pull Bow (Pack of 5)
features: Contains 5 Bouquet Boxes, invisiTrays and matching bows
Present your cupcakes as a beautiful bouquet - ideal for any and all occassions
Includes Cupcake Bouquet Box, invisiTray for 7 cupcakes and a Quick Pull Bow
Create a unique and stunning gift for someone special
description: Product Description The Cupcake Bouquet Box is the perfect way to gift cupcakes and flowers! Bake and decorate your cupcakes with flowers and voila - you have a vase of flower cupcakes to give as gift. Who doesn't love home baked cakes! The product consists of 1 cupcake bouquet box/vase and the exclusive invisiTray. No more fiddling with cups - cocktail sticks, polystyrene - anything. All you do is place the amazing invisiTray on top of your box and sit your cupcakes on. What's more all you see is your stunning creation. No ugly plastic or fixings etc. You will need a bow/ribbon of some sort to secure the Bouquet Box and some other sellers may not provide this. The creations are endless with this fabulous vase for presenting your cupcake bouquets. Choose from our wide variety of cupcake bouquet packaging and accessories for a truly professional finish - cellophane, tissue paper, ribbons and bows. Perfect for bridal gifts, baby showers & all other occasions. Combine cake and flowers in one! The Cupcake Bouquet Box with invisiTray is exclusively manufactured in the UK by us. You may see the product available from other sellers, who are our authorised resellers. How to Assemble the Cupcake Bouquet Box Flat Cupcake Bouquet Box The Cupcake Bouquet Box comes flat and is assembled very easily. The invisiTray insert is also separate and this is simply placed on top once you have secured the box base and tied with ribbon. Start to assemble To assemble your bouquet box you need to gently pull the box apart to form the shape. Start by folding the base of the box inwards. The cut gap in this section allows for all the other flaps to be tucked in forming a firm base. Fold the base flaps You then need to fold in the rest of the flaps as shown. (Some boxes are printed with numbers, however this shows which flaps to do first). This creates a secure base. Finish assembling the Bouquet Box Tuck the last flap of the base inwards. Once all flaps have been tucked in, turn the bouquet box the right way up and press the flaps firmly. Use the quick pull bow or ribbon of your choice to pull the top inwards and secure. Next pop the invisiTray insert on the top and finish with your decorated cupcakes. Cupcake Bouquet Box & invisiTray The exclusive and unique invisiTray insert means there are no visible cups or plastic within your cupcake bouquet. The tray sits neatly in the top of the box and the cupcakes sit on top of that. Perfect!
